_comment: Single source of truth for the /ns schedule. Edit ONLY this file to add or change sessions. Past entries (date < build date) auto-hide via src/components/Schedule.astro, so a Vercel rebuild prunes them. Date is ISO YYYY-MM-DD (matches the owner's file-naming convention).
